title: Italian-Style Flatbread Pizza with Guanciale
description: A classic Italian-style flatbread pizza topped with crispy guanciale and fresh herbs. This simple yet flavorful dish is perfect for a quick dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: Guanciale
ingredients.notes: Crispy guanciale is key to this recipe

instructions: Roll out the flatbread to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Brush the flatbread with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Top the flatbread with guanciale slices, making sure to cover the entire surface.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the guanciale.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and sprinkle with fresh parsley.
Slice into wedges and serve immediately.
